name: Smart Lab Bedroom
subtitle: Comfort and experiment begin to merge.
introText: Comfort and experiment begin to merge.
completionText: You turned a private space into a working intelligence nursery.
guideTone: curious, conversational, slightly excited by experiments
guideIntroLine: This room still remembers being lived in. That may matter more than the machines do.

transformationStages.name: Awkward Hybrid
transformationStages.description: Mixed bedroom/lab with awkward prototype clutter. A test bench shares space with pillows.

transformationStages.name: Functional Hybrid
transformationStages.description: Functional hybrid space with test benches, sensors, and controlled lighting.

transformationStages.name: Living Laboratory
transformationStages.description: Fully integrated experimental living-lab with elegant hardware and hidden compartments exposed.

secrets.title: The Hidden Lab
secrets.description: Interacting with non-tech furniture reveals hidden lab functionality.
secrets.hint: Try the nightstand drawer. It doesn't behave like furniture.

secrets.title: More Than Comfort
secrets.description: The room was hiding more than comfort.
secrets.hint: The guide notices when furniture reacts oddly.

secrets.title: The Hollow Drawer
secrets.description: One drawer sounds hollow compared to the others.
secrets.hint: Tap each drawer. Listen for the difference.

midSceneTwist.title: Failed Test Mutation
midSceneTwist.description: Failed experiments become a permanent new upgrade family.
midSceneTwist.effectDescription: Failed prototypes mutate into unique upgrades. A new branch of unstable-but-powerful options appears.

events.title: Prototype Bloom
events.description: A prototype device suddenly activates and begins producing useful output.

events.title: Sensor Drift
events.description: A sensor recalibrates itself and detects something new in the room.

events.title: Lab Spill Recovery
events.description: A chemical spill threatens a prototype. Quick action saves valuable material.

events.title: Test Bench Alert
events.description: The test bench flags a successful calibration. Output quality improves.

events.title: Homemade Tool Success
events.description: A jury-rigged tool works better than expected. Innovation rewards improvisation.

events.title: Sleep Cycle Bonus
events.description: The comfort systems trigger a rest-state bonus. The machine processes while you 'sleep.'

events.title: Robo-Arm Grab
events.description: The robotic arm reaches for a component before you do. It chose correctly.
events.flavorText: The arm is learning your patterns.

events.title: Unexpected Breakthrough
events.description: A random experiment produces an unexpectedly useful result.

events.title: Failed Test Mutation
events.description: A failed experiment mutates into something new. The error contains unexpected potential.

events.title: Under-Bed Hidden Compartment
events.description: A hidden compartment opens beneath the bed frame. Someone stored tech here deliberately.

events.title: Unlabeled Prototype Case
events.description: A sealed case with no label is found behind the furniture. Inside: something that shouldn't exist yet.
events.flavorText: Someone was building the future here.

roomLaw.name: Law of Dual Nature
roomLaw.description: Comfort and research influence each other
roomLaw.mechanic: Living-space upgrades boost lab output and vice versa; pure builds miss synergy bonuses

landmark.name: The Dream Monitor
landmark.description: A bedside screen that evolves into a neural interface
evolutionStages: A small bedside screen displaying static
The screen shows flickering dream fragments
Neural sensors attach and translate dream imagery
A full neural headset merges sleep data with waking input
The Dream Monitor bridges consciousness and computation seamlessly

hazard.name: Signal Noise
hazard.description: Background interference scrambles data packet production
hazard.penalty: Data packet output is reduced by 20% and gains random variance

stabilizer.name: Frequency Tuning
stabilizer.mechanic: Periodic frequency calibration actions clear accumulated noise

completionCeremony: Hidden compartments open. The room reveals it was always more lab than bedroom.
midSceneTwistLine: The failed tests are not gone. They're becoming something else.

completionReward.relicEffect: Increases chance that failed experiments become useful upgrades later

transitionIn.visual: Soft bedroom lighting fades in first, then sensors and lab lights wake underneath it.
transitionIn.audio: Gentle ambient hum shifting to quiet electronic beeps
transitionIn.titleReveal: Title appears like handwriting turning into UI

transitionOut.visual: Furniture outlines split open into hidden compartments. The room scans itself.
transitionOut.audio: Scanning pulse followed by a door unlocking
transitionOut.titleReveal: The scan beam becomes the entry corridor for the next room

codexAdditions.title: Prototype Archive
codexAdditions.content: Records of every experiment conducted in the hybrid living-lab space.

codexAdditions.title: Comfort and Curiosity
codexAdditions.content: The bed was still warm when the first test bench powered on.

codexAdditions.title: Hidden Under the Familiar
codexAdditions.content: The drawer wasn't broken. It was locked from inside.

codexAdditions.title: Where Home Became a Laboratory
codexAdditions.content: Private space became research space. The bedroom never slept again.
